issues.sample: 2014 Porsche Boxster- Consumer haves concerns about the hydro-mounting, which is causing a PADM fault.  Consumer paid for the repair & it occurred again. The first occurred after 35000 miles and again after 42000 miles. Consumer has read that others have had the same problem. Con

The door panels are warping and detaching from the door. I'm sure the airbags should be affected as well. I have contacted Porche America but no one calls except customer service who keeps no records of previous calls.

narrative.headline: What 2014 Porsche Boxster owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (50% of reports).
